name: remove_drc_checks
short_description: Remove DRC rule check objects from a user rule deck
full_help:
remove_drc_checks

Description: 
Remove DRC rule check objects from a user rule deck

Syntax: 
remove_drc_checks  [-of_objects <args>] [-regexp] [-nocase] [-filter <arg>]
                   -ruledeck <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
drc_check

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-of_objects]  Get 'rule_check' objects of these types: 'drc_ruledeck'.
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  -ruledeck      DRC rule deck to modify
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match the 'rule_check' objects against patterns.
                 Default: *

Categories: 
DRC, Object

arguments.description: Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp specified)
Suspend message limits during command execution
